description: Input schema for OmniHuman 1.5 avatar video generation.

image.description: Portrait image containing one or more people. JPG format recommended. Max 5MB, max 4096x4096 pixels.
image.title: Image

audio.description: Audio file to drive the avatar. Duration should be under 15 seconds for best quality.
audio.title: Audio

mask_index.description: Which detected subject to drive (0 = largest face/body, 1 = second largest, etc.). Set to 0 for single-person images.
mask_index.title: Mask Index

title: AppInput
